description: Crafted from the finest washed cow leather, the timberland men's Sauvage Hip wallet is a fabulously stylish way to keep your money and cards safe and secure. With a grainy, rustic finish, this wallet has an embossed branding on the upper and lots of inner storage making it perfect for everyday use.Dimensions: 11 cm X 9.5 cm100% washed cow aniline leather for flexibility and suppleness Two main compartments with fabric inner liningMultiple partitions on the two front halves to stash away cards CareWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust Crafted from the finest washed cow leather, the timberland Men's Sauvage Hip Wallet is a fabulously stylish way to keep your money and cards safe and secure.
